title: The Democrats Need to Start Lying
summary: Jessica Tarlov and Jessiah Eberlin of @ponderingpolitics talk about what Democrats’ strategy should be, in response to Trump’s State of the Union Address, on Raging Moderates.
transcript_html:
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/8Q1iLnv42fw

Transcript

I think he's lost his ability to the American people with these lies. I think they're going to be like, "Milk is costing more than it was." And you said you would cut costs on day one. We give you no points. >> Even asking for 20 seconds of humility for understanding the experience of average Americans is too much for him because his ego is so big. He was talking about how amazing the next three years were going to be, but wasn't harping on the last year as the golden age, right, which it was supposed to be. What Abigail Spanberger and Mikey Cheryl did and Mom Donnie is they talked about

affordability, but they had plans for how they were going to cut red tape, what loopholes they were going to close, etc. So, if you show up with a plan that's like, "This is how I'm going to get you on the home ownership ladder, like this is how I'm going to get you a better job. This is how I'm going to get you a small business permit, etc." I think you'd be in a much better place. Governor Spanberger and Governor Cheryl and Mayor Mdani, they can campaign on an economic agenda because by definition, they will have the power to enact it >> to actually do something. >> Speaker Hakeem Jeff won't be able to do that. >> But just say it like they lie all the time or they pretend like they can do

something. >> I mean, listen, touche.
